name: Solar Road Stud
shortDescription: Solar-powered LED road stud, self-illuminating for night-time lane marking.
longDescription: An active alternative to a plain reflective stud — an internal solar panel charges six LEDs through the day, self-illuminating the stud after dark without any external wiring or power run, for lane markers, junctions and hazard points that need to stay visible even where street lighting is poor.

images.alt: Solar Road Stud supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Night-time lane and hazard marking, no external power needed
